message:
test(db): add 27 search_v3.rs tests for Tantivy bridge, filters, results

Cover build_search_filter with all DocKind variants, importance filter
combinations (urgent, high, normal, low, mixed, combined), time range
(full, half-open, empty), sender/thread_id filters. Test convert_results
metadata extraction, missing metadata handling, doc_kind preservation.
Add TantivyBridge lifecycle tests (in_memory accessors, open creating
new index, open reusing existing index, nested directory creation).
Test measure_index_dir_bytes edge cases (nonexistent, empty directory).

Search V3 test count: 9 → 36.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
